response.overview: A team of investigators led by Clive Christopher analyze footage from an area in Arizona considered to be a hotspot for UFO & UAP activity. As a group, they give their professional opinions on this controversial UFO footage that is now available to the public. What they uncover forces them to take the next step on their journey, to go onsite!
response.tagline: A team of investigators led by Clive Christopher analyze footage from an area in Arizona considered to be a hotspot for UFO & UAP activity.
response.title: Aliens Uncovered: Observe & Report
